title: LLM Integration
content_html:
LLM Integration

Use language models as advisory tools for selected Analytics and document workflows without moving canonical ownership, validation, or write authority into the model integration.

Feature Documents

  • Concept — useful applications, boundaries, and questions.
  • Architecture — proposed invocation, review, validation, and domain ownership structure.
  • Library Summary Proposals Delivery — a possible first complete proving workflow.
  • Analytics Roadmap — relative importance and sequence.

The feature is paused. None of its proposed architecture is a dependency for current work.
